//: Cursor: Settings -> MCP -> Add new global MCP server, OR save as .cursor/mcp.json in your project. Same schema as Claude Desktop / Claude Code.
//easy-path: This variant uses the PLAINTEXT env key source (no keystore). Fine for testnet / small float — the server prints a loud warning. Replace the 0x... placeholders with your own keys, or delete the three STARLING_PK_* lines and set STARLING_KEY_SOURCE to "auto" to use an encrypted keystore created by `agent-wallet init`.
